name: fin_clean_row_count
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_FIN_CLEAN

name: fin_clean_missing_amount
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_FIN_CLEAN WHERE amount IS NULL OR TRIM(amount) = ''

name: fin_clean_currency_usd
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_FIN_CLEAN WHERE currency <> 'USD'

name: fin_missing_amount
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_FIN_MISSING_DATA WHERE amount IS NULL OR TRIM(amount) = ''

name: fin_type_amount_numeric
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_FIN_TYPE_ERRORS WHERE TRY_TO_DECIMAL(amount, 18, 2) IS NULL

name: fin_range_currency_usd
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM DATA_VALIDATOR.PUBLIC.DQV_FIN_RANGE_ERRORS WHERE currency <> 'USD'
